name: Northern Scorpion Jr.
description: The juvenile version of the Northern Scorpion. It is smaller, but still dangerous if allowed to get close.
behavior: It moves quickly and uses tight spaces to close distance.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes aggressive when damaged or when it sees a nearby variant being attacked.
interactionWithCreatures: It can get into nearby fights easily, especially if its group is disturbed.
strategy: Treat it like a mobile threat: stop its advance and do not let it box you in.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 2-Hit Combo: 28. Long Combo: 35. Claw Slam: 55. Burrow Strike: 60.

abilities.name: 2-Hit Combo
abilities.description: It opens exchanges with two short, quick hits.

abilities.name: Long Combo
abilities.description: It extends pressure with a longer chain if it sees you still inside range.

abilities.name: Claw Slam
abilities.description: It drops a heavy claw strike to break your answer if you step in too soon.

abilities.name: Burrow Strike
abilities.description: It burrows and pops back out by surprise to restart pressure.
